tasks.subject: Task 1: Test Suite
tasks.description: Create test/prompt-eval-suite.json with 45 test cases across 7 categories

tasks.subject: Task 2: Evaluation Harness
tasks.description: Create eval-prompt.sh that runs prompt templates against test suite

tasks.subject: Task 3: Candidate Prompt Templates
tasks.description: Create 5 candidate prompt template files in prompts/

tasks.subject: Task 4: Run Baseline and All Candidates
tasks.description: Run all 5 candidates through test suite, capture results

tasks.subject: Task 5: Select Winner, Refine, and Validate
tasks.description: Compare results, select winner per spec criteria, refine, validate

tasks.subject: Task 6: Port Winning Prompt to Production
tasks.description: Update build_prompt in smart-approve.sh with winning prompt
